insights: The market underwent a structural step-up in volume around day 14, moving from a ~1000-job baseline to a ~1300-job baseline, suggesting a seasonal hiring surge.
Unicorn-tier companies are driving the bulk of the growth, indicating that venture-backed startups are aggressively expanding their entry-level talent pipelines.
While the 'other' category shows minor volatility, the core technical roles (SWE, ML, SRE) exhibit consistent upward momentum, signaling strong demand for specialized engineering skills.
